SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REALES, ENA ROSARIO $11,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,400.00, DEFENDANT ENA ROSARIO REALES IS RESPONSIBLE AND LIABLE FOR DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,400.00. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT LUIS ERNAN MAGALLON IS RESPONSIBLE OR LIABLE FOR ANY PORTION OF THE $11,400.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
